10 
 Statement of Comprehensive Income (Income and Expenditure Account Statement) For Year Ending 31 December 2020 
The Income and Expenditure Account Statement brings together all the revenue related income and expenditure. It shows the surplus/ (deficit) for the 
year. Transfers to/from reserves are shown separately and not allocated by service division.  Note 16 allocates transfers by service division in the same 
format as Table A of the adopted Local Authority budget.
